title: Unable to acess verilated.cpp
body:
Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  
```shell

root@17a3bf3f6e35:/neuralmc/Again/Verilog# cat toy.sv
module toy (input clk, input rst);

  reg [20:0] c;

  always @(posedge clk)
    if(rst == 1)
      c <= 0;
    else
      c <= c + 1;

endmodule
root@17a3bf3f6e35:/neuralmc/Again/Verilog# verilator --binary -j 0 -Wall toy.sv
make: Entering directory '/neuralmc/Again/Verilog/obj_dir'
make: *** No rule to make target '/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/Cellar/verilator/5.022/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp', needed by 'verilated.o'.  Stop.
make: Leaving directory '/neuralmc/Again/Verilog/obj_dir'
%Error: make -C obj_dir -f Vtoy.mk -j 8 exited with 2
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /usr/local/bin/verilator_bin --binary -j 0 -Wall toy.sv

``` 
What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
```shell
root@17a3bf3f6e35:/neuralmc/Again/Verilog# verilator --version
Verilator 5.022 2024-02-24 rev v5.020-157-g2b4852048
``` 
What OS and distribution are you using?
I am using an Ubuntu docker container where I have built ventilator, the machine I am using is a M2 Macbook Air, running MacOS.

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
yes
